# godaddy_domain_nameservers (Resource)

Manage the authoritative nameserver set for an existing GoDaddy domain.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Existing GoDaddy domain to manage.
- `name_servers` (List of String) Full authoritative nameserver set. Minimum 2 nameservers.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Canonical resource identifier equal to the domain name.
- `status` (String) Current domain status.
- `updated_via_v2` (Boolean) Whether the most recent managed update used the v2 async nameserver path.
